metadata.cameraPrompt: show me the desk from the doorway, then orbit left and rise

stages.title: Video Intake
stages.description: Inspect the input video and initialize a local-safe job profile.

stages.title: Frame Extraction
stages.description: Extract frames, keep previews, and capture sampling metadata.

stages.title: Reconstruction
stages.description: Run COLMAP / Nerfstudio / gsplat or fall back to placeholder-safe outputs.

stages.title: USD + Cameras
stages.description: Compose the USD stage and generate preset plus prompt-directed cameras.

stages.title: Cosmos + Output
stages.description: Write optional Cosmos outputs and produce the final walkthrough video.
